sections.markdown:
- 4 km easy run
- Treat this as an optional shakeout only.
- Friday's `10.03 km` run stayed stable enough that you can take this if you still feel good and both ankles stay quiet on Saturday.
- Keep it genuinely easy and short. This is a freshness check, not a mileage grab.
- If the good feeling fades or either ankle starts talking again, take full rest instead.
